programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.desc: A massive seven-acre, snow-covered hoard pushes Matt to the brink; when it takes the team a full day just to unclog the driveway, Matt's deep in the red; to clear the stairs, they toss 500 pounds of trash and hunt for a lost gold nugget on the top floor.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: All-star survivalists Wes and Suzänne take on Ecuador's relentless rainforest; aggressive pumas, venomous snakes and constant storms make every step dangerous and even these veterans are not prepared for the shocking news that shakes their challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: For the first time ever, two survivalists are forced to spend the first night of their 21-day challenge completely alone in Botswana's, Okavango Delta; raging storms, swarming mosquitoes, and starvation push them both to the brink.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.desc: Matt is shocked when clients reveal a Pioneer Village that's become a ghost town after three decades of abandonment; Matt hunts for a rare Colt prototype and a Babe Ruth autograph rumored to be on a hot dog wrapper; a vintage Levi's find draws big money.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.desc: A massive seven-acre, snow-covered hoard pushes Matt to the brink; when it takes the team a full day just to unclog the driveway, Matt's deep in the red; to clear the stairs, they toss 500 pounds of trash and hunt for a lost gold nugget on the top floor.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: All-star survivalists Wes and Suzänne take on Ecuador's relentless rainforest; aggressive pumas, venomous snakes and constant storms make every step dangerous and even these veterans are not prepared for the shocking news that shakes their challenge.

programme.title: Expedition From Hell: The Lost Tapes
programme.sub-title: I'm Gonna Die on This Mountain
programme.desc: A perilous bridge crossing exposes Mickey's crusade for good film footage before the team heads deep into the Eastern Andes; Mickey claims to have sent a team member who broke down back to civilization, but team members are unable to find him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine
programme.desc: With the team struggling, Dave's business partner arrives at the claim to observe the operation; his presence creates tension when he identifies one of the miners as the weak link.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: It's the start of hunting season, dubbed the holy day for game wardens; Wardens Inman and Eddins investigate the illegal shooting of two deer; Wardens Stapleton and McGee swap out bass in the Bois d'Arc Lake.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: During deer hunting season, Wardens Gould and Scott respond to a call about finding carcasses on private property; a horse owner's home is peppered with stray bullets, while hunters are questioned about hunting illegally.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Confronting a suspected duck and goose poacher; monitoring an injured deer running along a highway; a man is arrested after confessing to poaching a deer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Warden Cummings deals with an angry man who blew a stop sign; Warden Boone helps chase a trio of armed robbers on the run; Warden Inman investigates a group of suspected deer hunters for trespassing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: In Llano County, a jet skier's life is spared after an explosion on the water; when a man fakes his own death, Warden Herchman and Stapleton join forces to track him down; a man is found trespassing while fishing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: In Liberty County, Warden Jake Noxon investigates a family for illegally keeping a pet deer; an alligator roams a garage; Warden Mike Boone joins forces with local police to track down armed suspects after a robbery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: Behind the walls of Clayton County Jail, deteriorating infrastructure creates dangerous conditions for both inmates and staff.

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: Caddo Parish Correctional Center is struggling with a staffing shortage, the inmates outnumber the deputies by 180 to one; to ensure the safety of both inmates and staff alike, the Emergency Response Team springs into action.

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: Virginia Beach is a party town with a vibrant nightlife, making its Correctional Center one of the busiest city jails in the state. Here, some inmates arrive to go on vacation, then leave on probation -- and return on a violation.

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: In Bristol County Jail, half of the cells don't lock. As changing demographics bring in more violent, gang-affiliated criminals, staff must manage a higher-risk population without the facility slipping into chaos.

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: Methamphetamine is found hidden within a semi-truck full of frozen broccoli, a man is caught smuggling pills inside containers of protein powder, a traveler tries to bring a deer trophy across the border, and an intoxicated US citizen is detained.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: Officers stop a man suspected of money laundering; cocaine is found hidden in an unexpected area of a shipping truck; a traveler is caught trying to bring weaponry into Mexico; a father is stopped when trying to smuggle medication for his son.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: An illicit shipment is disguised in bags of concrete; officers identify a criminal wanted for burglary when he attempts to cross the border; a woman is caught smuggling too many diet pills; a retired police officer almost carries a gun into Mexico.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Airport
programme.desc: Rising tariffs tempt some citizens to go abroad to buy luxury goods, where items can be up to 40% cheaper, then bring them home without paying the proper duties. A traveler returning from Italy claims she has a $50,000 watch belonging to her brother.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Airport
programme.desc: A passenger arriving from Cairo has brought some extra carry-ons that interest officers; an American fashion designer returning from Paris fails to declare nearly $20,000 worth of luxury goods; a bag of snails from West Africa raises suspicions.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: In Georgia, officers find a car in a ditch with no sign of the male driver; when they speak to his best friend, the investigation takes a turn.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: Virginia Beach is a party town with a vibrant nightlife, making its Correctional Center one of the busiest city jails in the state. Here, some inmates arrive to go on vacation, then leave on probation -- and return on a violation.

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Airport
programme.desc: A man arrives with what looks like multiple rounds of high-caliber bullets in his suitcase; when a K-9 alerts to a harmless box of kids' games, officers find more than they bargained for; Officers are alarmed by a traveler's strong-smelling soap.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Locals Only
programme.desc: In Maple Grove, Penn., Farmtruck and AZN pick eight local small-tire racers to compete for $5K; the winner gets a chance to take on legendary Street Outlaw Daddy Dave for another $5K in cash.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine
programme.desc: With winter closing in fast, Dave and Lance hedge their bets with a prospect in a historical mining district in the foothills of Mt. Denali. Back on the claim, the team faces obstacles from mother nature and machine, but break a long-time team gold record.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: Stretched thin and off-pace, Jared watches a loader tumble down the road; foreman Brad attempts to land his plane in choppy weather, but is forced to shelter nearby; Barge Day arrives.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: With pressure mounting after a disastrous first Forever Claim barge and the prospect of losing Float Camp, Jared brings in more crew, including a gamble on a new Fat Truck driver to boost production; Float Camp Claim races to end strong.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: After the loader fire, Jared faces a new reality, wildfire threat; Adrian is tasked with reviving a rusted fire truck, while fallers fall high-dollar timber; when road damage shuts down their main haul route, the operation grinds to a halt.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: Fire season shutdown is imminent and Jared's crew races to fulfill a barge of the summer; Chainsaws spark fires and when a blaze hits the Forever Claim, Jared must make a call whether to end the season early.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: A Big Island family finds their off-grid paradise threatened by destructive storms and deadly pests; to save them, the Raneys must get creative.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Marty returns to Interior Alaska to help a single mother whose homestead is on the brink of ruin; with a quake-damaged water line and bears circling the property, he must act fast to protect the Adams family's animals and dream.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The off-grid dream of an Arkansas family spans three generations, they're struggling to make it work; a polar vortex hits mid-rescue and the Raneys must pivot fast to protect lives and salvage the homestead's future.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: When the brakes fail on Mark and Huck's bootleg vehicle, their luck and their shine quickly hit rock bottom; Mike and Jerry cross police lines to get their shine back; Mark and Digger score a prized strain of wheat made famous by Kentucky's best bourbons.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: Tim, Tickle and Henry confront the rogue shiners who torched their stash house; Mike and Jerry make liquor from candy roaster squash; but when they fail to return Mark and Huck's copper still cap, it's the mountain men who deliver their just desserts.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: Mark and Digger team up with Josh to hunt down a police informant; Tim and Tickle plot revenge on shiners who destroyed $20,000 worth of their liquor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: Tickle makes tariff-free apple brandy to help resolve the shortage of American liquor on Canadian shelves; Mike and Jerry learn they're wanted men; Josh discovers the source of industrial ethanol that's fueling a glut of fake moonshine across Appalachia.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: In the season finale, Tim enlists Tickle to smuggle tariff-free shine by airplane and rallies a band of fellow outlaws to take back his family's turf; Mark and Digger turn the law against a counterfeiter; Mike and Jerry push Mark Rogers past his limit.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: A garage-built experiment turns a cultural icon, the Meyers Manx dune buggy, which makes car building accessible to the masses; however, its success unleashes a flood of copycats that nearly wiped out the very garage that started it all.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: As people spend more time in cars, drivers crave the comforts of home; factory options like glove-box cocktail bars promise just that, though not all are created equal; join Jeff Dunham for a ride through the wacky world of factory options!

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.desc: In a house packed with oddities, Matt finds megalodon teeth, tribal masks and Civil War bullets; the team struggles to make the kitchen functional again; after low-ball offers, Matt scrambles and lands his biggest payday yet.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.sub-title: Amping up the Mess and Money
programme.desc: Matt takes on a rock star mess to find classic guitars and amps, vintage trucks and rare Harleys; the hoard's heavy metal puts the team at risk.

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: In the season finale, Tim enlists Tickle to smuggle tariff-free shine by airplane and rallies a band of fellow outlaws to take back his family's turf; Mark and Digger turn the law against a counterfeiter; Mike and Jerry push Mark Rogers past his limit.
